options.command: cd apps/smart-suggest && ([ -d node_modules ] || mise exec -- pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts) && mise exec -- pnpm build

cd apps/smart-suggest && ([ -d node_modules ] || mise exec -- pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts) && mise exec -- pnpm cloudflare:build
